description: Product Description Innovative, Dynamic and Excellent in Home, Travel and Smart Life. Exzact offers a wide range of cutlery set and kitchen products, made from high-quality material, with designs from traditional to contemporary to suit your everyday life or special events. We help you enjoy great food everyday from breakfast with family to dining with friends, from tea break in your office to a barbecue in the garden. For family with kids, our children cutlery set perfectly designed to suit children's dinning of age group from 24 months to 12 years. With our Ergonomic design, kids learn how to eat quicker and effortless. Exzact offers a wide range of cutlery set and kitchen products, made from high-quality material, with designs from traditional to contemporary to suit your everyday life or special events. We help you enjoy great food everyday from breakfast with family to dining with friends, from tea break in your office to a barbecue in the garden. Premium quality stainless steel. Dishwasher safe. Dishwasher Safe Dishwasher safe, extremely durable. Stainless Steel Food grade and free of any hazardous materials. Gifting Great gift as a birthday present or Christmas gift.
